name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.PedalLegsHelper.Ellipse
summary: Turn the circle into an ellipse.  Ellipse has horizontal radius a and vertical radius b.  If ellipse is +ve then a=radius*ellipse and b=radius.  If ellipse is -ve then a=radius and b = radius*ellipse.  0.0 = vertical line of length 2*radius, 0.0:1.0 circle squashed horizontally (vertical radius = radius), 1.0=circle.  -0.001 = horizontal line of length 2*radius, -0.0:-1.0 circle squashed vertically (horizontal radius = radius), -1.0 = circle.
remarks:
Default value = 1.0f.
            Min value = -1.0f.
            Max value = 1.0f.
